allow: Bash(node -e "const fs=require\('fs'\); const src=fs.readFileSync\('C:/Users/Julius/Documents/GitHub/japanese-trainer/index.html','utf8'\); const m=src.match\(/<script>\([\\s\\S]*?\)<\\/script>/\); if\(!m\){console.log\('no script tag'\);process.exit\(1\);} const code=m[1]; require\('vm'\).createScript\(code,{filename:'index.html-script'}\); console.log\('script parses OK \('+code.length+' chars\)'\);")
